$comment: Shared policy for skill learnings/ corpora. Each skill may override per-skill knobs in its own config/learning-policy.json.

tiers.core: Always loaded into context. Cross-cutting, high-signal lessons.
tiers.situational: Loaded when the relevant phase or system is in play.

review.note: A learning must state the precondition under which it applies. Do not trust a learning without verifying its precondition holds in the current codebase.
